--- title: "Market Prices" section: markets updated: 2026-02-24 --- ## 📈 Today's Prices ### Cereals (£/tonne) | Commodity | Price | Change | |-----------|-------|--------| | Wheat (feed) | £165 | 📈 +£2.50 | | Wheat (milling) | £185 | 📈 +£2.00 | | Barley (feed) | £155 | 📉 -£1.00 | | Rapeseed | £420 | 📈 +£5.00 | ### Livestock (£/kg) | Type | Price | Change | |------|-------|--------| | Beef (R4L) | £4.25 | 📈 +8p | | Lamb (R3) | £2.85 | 📈 +15p | | Milk | £0.38/L | 📈 +1p | *[Updated daily from AHDB]*
